---
title: "Vignette 2: CRSP Stocks and SPGMI Factors in PCRA"
---

**Authors:** Doug Martin and Jon Spinney

Deep dive into the `stocksCRSPmonthly` and `factorsSPGMIr` datasets, the `selectCRSPandSPGMI` function, `xts` time series manipulation, sector/capitalization subsetting, and weekly/daily CRSP data.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
[Download PDF](pdfs/vignette-2.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary} &nbsp;&nbsp; [View on GitHub](https://github.com/robustport/PCRA/tree/main/vignettes){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

```{=html}
<iframe src="pdfs/vignette-2.pdf" width="100%" height="950px" style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>
```
